name: Parmesan Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk, salt, and pepper in a medium saucepan over medium heat until steaming hot, about 6 minutes.
2. Add the frozen mashed potatoes and cook, stirring constantly, until smooth and hot, about 6 minutes.
3. Add the butter and parmesan cheese; stir until the butter melts.
